title: [comb] Canonicalize away comb.extract from comb.concat
body:
I see stuff like this in generated Verilog:

```
module foo(input  [127:0] io_in_data_1 ...)

wire [22:0] _T_38 = io_in_data_1[22:0];
wire [23:0] _T_39 = {1'h0, _T_38};
wire [4:0] _tmp_1030 = _T_39[3] ? 5'h14 : _T_39[2] ? 5'h15 : _T_39[1] ? 5'h16 : 5'h17;
```

Given our cost model, we can always forward substitute the things being concat'd into a comb.extract, so we should be able to simplify this to something like:

```
wire [4:0] _tmp_1030 = io_in_data_1[3] ? 5'h14 : io_in_data_1[2] ? 5'h15 : io_in_data_1[1] ? 5'h16 : 5'h17;`
```
